pages.text: Fireball: Lianqi Early, fire, costs 10 qi.$(br)Regeneration: Lianqi Middle, wood.$(br)Lingbeng: Lianqi Late, thunder, costs 50 qi.$(br)Beam: costs 30 qi and is visible only to the caster.

Earth Escape: Lianqi Late. Sink underground, move faster, and spend qi over time until you surface.$(br)Cleanse: Lianqi Early, water, clears harmful effects.$(br)Spirit Sight: toggles night vision for 5 qi per second.

Qi Gathering: Lianqi Early. It costs no qi and greatly improves qi regeneration, but you cannot attack or block. Damage taken while gathering qi is tripled.$(br)Ignite Flare: Lianqi Early, fire, ignites the block it hits.
